sources.note: Primary reporting: 500+ comments, fewer than a dozen in favor; verbatim 'HELL NO to any data centers' and 'NO AI'; Stak CSO John Boyle 'over $10 billion' full-build estimate; July 3, 2026

sources.outlet: Alaska DNR Division of Oil & Gas — public notice (ADL 422741)
sources.note: Primary: STAK Energy Corporation, 715.4 acres, 50-year lease, ~26 mi south of Deadhorse; preliminary decision to offer, comment window (extended to July 17, 2026, 4:30 pm AKDT)

sources.outlet: Northern Alaska Environmental Center — lease analysis
sources.note: Primary: ~$500M initial site work per the lease documents; 1 to 3 GW generation; gas-fired; May 28, 2026
Second-source corroboration of the comment split and verbatim comments, July 8, 2026
